svg.title: KV Cache
svg.desc: Autoregressive decoding with KV cache: stored K/V boxes for previous tokens; new token Q attends to all cached K,V. Compares O(n²) recompute vs O(n) cache. Notes paged attention in vLLM.

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: KV stored in fixed-size pages, like virtual memory — eliminates fragmentation, enables large-batch serving
